title: Coral 10501 Easy Coater Paint Kit with Headlock and Mini Roller Frame and Hybrid Brush 12 Piece Pack Set
features: Searching for a high performance paint roller set? Do you want to achieve an impressive, smooth finish? Do you want painting to be faster and easier?
The paint roller hasn't fundamentally changed since the 1940s. Most still use clumsy slip-on, slip-off designs that do not hold the cover securely in place. This is different. It's been re-thought.
Our simple yet incredibly useful HEADLOCK technology locks 9" covers onto the frame! Avoid mess, pain, lost time, and potential damage from roller slippage. You'll finish faster. You'll paint easier.
You'll achieve a smooth finish with the 9" roller frame. The mini-roller for is for small areas. Use the foam for gloss and microfiber for emulsion. Keep rollers fresh with the Seal & Save wrapper.
Painting shouldn't be hard work. Choose HEADLOCK technology for faster and easier painting with more control and less mess.
description: Take a look at this Decorating Set 12PC from Coral Tools. Created as an easier decorating set for when you are applying paint to walls, ceilings, trim, window sills, door panels, furniture, and radiators. Featuring patented HEADLOCK technology on the 9" paint roller frame giving you the advantage of a roller cover that can be securely locked onto the HEADLOCK frame. This means you'll be assured of faster and easier painting with an impressive smooth finish and reduced lint loss! You can expect to receive a kit for 9" (229mm) paint rollers including the tray, a 9x1.5" frame, and 2x 9" microfiber roller covers, together with a 4" (100mm) mini-roller frame, 4x 4" microfiber mini roller covers, 2x 4" foam roller covers , and a Hybrid paint brush with integrated paint can opener. Made with a polypropylene tray, a soft grip 9" paint roller frame with HEADLOCK technology, a soft grip 4" Mini-roller frame, woven microfiber covers for emulsion / water paints, foam covers for gloss / solvent based paints, and a paint brush with a metal pry bar for opening paint cans. The next time you're painting, avoid the worry and make sure you have this complete painting set. Order yours now.
